description: Verso: Large fragment filled with Arabic script. It appears to be a Jewish prayer: "yā Allāh" (l. 6), "I thirst for your mercy like the ground thirsts for water" (l. 17), "for the sake of the covenant with our fathers Ibrāhīm Isḥāq and Yaʿqūb..." (margin, ll. 12–13). Needs examination.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
